title: After Action Report: WVL Commissioner Mode + Bug Fixes
scope: Fix WVL owner mode crash, fix college dynasty multi-season issues, then build a new Commissioner Mode that lets users run the entire 64-team WVL without owning a team — with career tracking, Hall of Fame, and FIV integration.

rationale.item: wvl_dynasty.py had local CLUBS_BY_KEY = {...} assignments inside two functions that shadowed the module-level import from wvl_config, causing KeyError crashes
Roster continuity broke across seasons because player_card.py lacked a card_to_player round-trip function, and the CVL→WVL bridge export wasn't surfaced in the API or UI

actions.description: Bug fix 1: WVL owner mode crash — removed local rebindings shadowing module-level CLUBS_BY_KEY import
Bug fix 2: College dynasty multi-season — added card_to_player() to player_card.py, graduating pool visibility in api/main.py, dynasty season transition roster preservation
New engine: PlayerCareerTracker (353 lines) — tracks players across CVL/WVL/FIV
New engine: HallOfFame (206 lines) — auto-induction on retirement, manual nominations, SQLite persistence
New engine: WVLCommissioner dynasty engine (488 lines)
Persistence: db.py commissioner dynasty and HoF save/load/delete methods (+62 lines)
New UI: Commissioner mode 5-tab dashboard (743 lines)
Navigation: mode selector cards and auto-resume for existing commissioner saves

risk_posture: Bug fixes were surgical. The owner mode crash was a 2-line delete.

validation_claims.claim: Ran a 2-season end-to-end test confirming 5,197 players tracked, serialization round-trip, player moves, HoF nominations, and DB persistence all working before writing any UI code.
validation_claims.check_method: Run wvl_commissioner.py engine through 2 simulated seasons and check player count + DB

non_actions.item: Automated tests for career tracker and HoF auto-induction logic
non_actions.reason: All validation was manual (inline Python script). Should have unit tests.

non_actions.item: FIV cycle integration — _resolve_fiv_code doesn't exist yet in FIV module
non_actions.reason: run_fiv_cycle() exists and routes players by nationality, but _resolve_fiv_code doesn't exist yet in the FIV module, so the import will fail at runtime.

residual_risks: Stat mapping gap — career yards/TDs will be 0 until player_season_stats keys are reconciled with career tracker lookup (player_season_stats keys by player_id, career tracker matches by name)
FIV _resolve_fiv_code needs to be implemented in engine/fiv.py for international play to work
Memory — 5,000+ PlayerCareerRecord objects serialize into dynasty blob; may get large after 20+ seasons
No undo for player moves — commissioner moves are instant and not journaled
open_hooks: Career tracker and HoF are standalone — can be used by owner mode too, not just commissioner mode
Recommendations for next session: fix stat key mismatch, add _resolve_fiv_code, add unit tests, wire Sim Full Season + Offseason one-click loop
